en: Then Jonah prayed to the LORD his God from the belly of the fish,
zh: 約拿從魚腹中向耶和華他的 神禱告，

en: saying, "I called out to the LORD, out of my distress, and he answered me; out of the belly of Sheol I cried, and you heard my voice.
zh: 說： “我從患難中求告耶和華， 他就應允我； 我從陰間的深府呼求， 你就垂聽我的聲音。

en: For you cast me into the deep, into the heart of the seas, and the flood surrounded me; all your waves and your billows passed over me.
zh: 你把我投入深海， 在海洋的深處， 大水環繞我； 你的洪濤、你的波浪，都漫過我。

en: Then I said, 'I am driven away from your sight; Yet I shall again look upon your holy temple.'
zh: 我說：‘我雖從你眼前被趕逐， 我仍要仰望你的聖殿。’

en: The waters closed in over me to take my life; the deep surrounded me; weeds were wrapped about my head
zh: 眾水包圍我，幾乎置我於死地； 深淵環繞我； 海草纏裹我的頭。

en: at the roots of the mountains. I went down to the land whose bars closed upon me forever; yet you brought up my life from the pit, O LORD my God.
zh: 我下沉直到山麓， 大地的門閂把我永遠關閉； 耶和華我的 神啊！你卻把我的性命從坑中拉上來。

en: When my life was fainting away, I remembered the LORD, and my prayer came to you, into your holy temple.
zh: 當我心靈疲弱時， 我就思念耶和華； 我的禱告直達你面前， 進入你的聖殿。

en: Those who pay regard to vain idols forsake their hope of steadfast love.
zh: 那敬奉虛妄之偶像的人， 實在是離棄了憐愛他們的 神 。

en: But I with the voice of thanksgiving will sacrifice to you; what I have vowed I will pay. Salvation belongs to the LORD!"
zh: 至於我，我要帶著感謝的聲音向你獻祭； 我所許的願，我必償還。 救恩是屬於耶和華的。”

en: And the LORD spoke to the fish, and it vomited Jonah out upon the dry land.
zh: 於是耶和華吩咐那魚，魚就把約拿吐在陸地上。
